demo_derivative_pair.per_scale_note: All three scales identical (0.9644) — demo inputs are pre-extracted 10s .npy files; re-segmentation is not possible from cached embeddings.

sonics_auc_evaluation.reason: SONICS feature files were extracted at 10s on Colab (/content/sonics_features/*.npy) and are not locally available for re-extraction at 5s and 30s. Re-evaluation requires original audio files.
sonics_auc_evaluation.expected_combined_auc_note: A weighted combination of three monotonic transforms of the same MERT similarity has identical ROC AUC to the best single-scale score when the scales use the same underlying .npy cache. AUC gain is only achievable if the 5s and 30s scales capture partially independent structural variance, which requires re-extraction from raw audio.
